languages.text: "По Уставу долг взвода снабжения — постоянный поиск ресурсов, Ваша Светлость".
"According to the Handbook, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "По Уставу долг взвода снабжения — постоянный поиск ресурсов, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: "According to the Code, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"According to the Code, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"According to the Code, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"According to the Code, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: “根据《手册》，后勤排的职责就是持续不断地确保资源的补给，大人。”
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “根据《手册》，后勤排的职责就是持续不断地确保资源的补给，大人。”

languages.text: "El Kitabı'na göre ikmal takımının müfrezesinin vazifesi, sürekli olarak kaynak tedarikidir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "El Kitabı'na göre ikmal takımının müfrezesinin vazifesi, sürekli olarak kaynak tedarikidir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: « D'après le Manuel, un peloton d'approvisionnement a pour devoir de veiller à ce que le régiment ne manque jamais de ressources, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « D'après le Manuel, un peloton d'approvisionnement a pour devoir de veiller à ce que le régiment ne manque jamais de ressources, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: «Según el manual, un pelotón de aprovisionamiento tiene por tarea obtener recursos constantes, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «Según el manual, un pelotón de aprovisionamiento tiene por tarea obtener recursos constantes, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: "Gemäß Handbuch ist die Pflicht eines Versorgungszugs die kontinuierliche Bereitstellung von Ressourcen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Gemäß Handbuch ist die Pflicht eines Versorgungszugs die kontinuierliche Bereitstellung von Ressourcen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: 「便覧によれば、補給小隊の務めは、絶え間ない資源の調達にあります、{mf|閣下|閣下}」
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, the duty of a supply platoon is the constant procurement of resources, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 「便覧によれば、補給小隊の務めは、絶え間ない資源の調達にあります、{mf|閣下|閣下}」
